summary: ✅ V2 Optimizer — 2026-05-28. Winners: 0 (no clicks yet). Near-winners: 1 (loan-20k query at pos 11). CTR fixes: 0 (metas already strong — root cause was noindex). Indexed: 4 quality URLs + 1 blog post + 85 bulk = 133 total.
